capacity_reservation.value: Published reserved/committed-use vehicles: Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, Dedicated Host Reservations, Capacity Blocks for ML, On-Demand Capacity Reservations; noncancellable, nonrefundable, use-it-or-lose-it (enterprise commitments negotiated, not published)
capacity_reservation.citation: Savings Plans, EC2 Reserved Instances and EC2 Dedicated Host Reservations are noncancellable

data_use_ai_training.value: Core: no training on customer content (never); some AI services use AI Content to improve models by default with AWS Organizations opt-out; varies by service/tier
data_use_ai_training.citation: We will not use Individualized Usage Data or Your Content to compete with your…

suspension_rights.value: May suspend immediately upon notice for security risk, adverse impact, liability, fraud, material breach, non-payment, or insolvency
suspension_rights.citation: We may suspend your or any End User's right to access or use... immediately…

termination.value: Customer may terminate for convenience anytime; AWS may terminate for convenience on 30 days' notice; 30-day post-termination data retrieval window if fees paid
termination.citation: We may terminate this Agreement for any reason by providing you at least 30…

unilateral_modification.value: AWS may modify at any time by posting; effective upon posting or as stated in email; 12 months' notice to discontinue material functionality, 90 days for adverse SLA changes
unilateral_modification.citation: modified terms will become effective upon posting or, if we notify you by email

governing_law_disputes.value: Varies by contracting party; US default Washington law, King County courts; binding arbitration (AAA) for US/several parties; class-action waiver yes
governing_law_disputes.citation: any dispute resolution proceedings will be conducted only on an individual basis and not…

liability.value: Cap = amounts paid in 12 months before liability arose; carveout for Section 7 indemnity payment obligations; consequential/indirect damages waived
liability.citation: WILL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNTS PAID BY YOU TO AWS... DURING THE 12 MONTHS…

output_indemnity.value: Yes for Indemnified Generative AI Services (Nova, Titan, Q, etc.); uncapped (not subject to damages cap); conditions: enable filters, no fine-tuning-caused infringement, stop on notice
output_indemnity.citation: AWS's defense and payment obligations under this Section 50.10 will not be subject to…

deprecation.value: Documented/contractual commitment: at least 12 months' prior notice before discontinuing material functionality of a generally available Service
deprecation.citation: at least 12 months' prior notice before discontinuing a material functionality of a Service

benchmarking_restrictions.value: Permitted but consent/disclosure-conditioned: must disclose all info to replicate and allow AWS reciprocal benchmarking
benchmarking_restrictions.citation: you... will include in any disclosure, and will disclose to us, all information necessary…

competitive_training.value: any-model-training restricted for AI Services: may not generate content to train an AI model or develop a substantially similar model
competitive_training.citation: you may not use an AI Service to generate Content for the express purpose…

capacity_remedies.value: Capacity Blocks/Reservations: noncancellable and nonrefundable; if AWS terminates program/agreement other than for cause, pro rata refund of up-front fee; no delivery-failure credits stated
capacity_remedies.citation: the full price of a Capacity Block is nonrefundable

hardware_substitution.value: Unilateral: EC2 resources may be terminated or replaced due to failure, retirement or other AWS requirements
hardware_substitution.citation: your Amazon EC2 resources may be terminated or replaced due to failure, retirement or…

assignment_financing.value: Customer may not assign without consent; AWS may assign without consent (merger, sale, affiliate, reorganization); no lender step-in/financing language
assignment_financing.citation: We may assign this Agreement without your consent

availability_definition.value: instance-level and region-level: Region-Level 99.99% (multi-AZ), Instance-Level 99.5%; based on no external connectivity
availability_definition.citation: Monthly Uptime Percentage of at least 99.99%... Instance-Level Uptime Percentage of at least 99.5%

credit_regime.citation: this SLA sets forth your sole and exclusive remedies

claim_mechanics.value: Must file claim via AWS Support Center by end of second billing cycle after incident; must include dates/times, resource IDs, and request logs
claim_mechanics.citation: credit request must be received by us by the end of the second billing…

sla_exclusions.value: Present: force majeure/outside control, external network/ISP beyond demarcation, customer fault/actions, customer equipment/software, suspension/termination; beta/preview and Outposts excluded elsewhere
sla_exclusions.citation: caused by factors outside of our reasonable control, including any force majeure event
